item.title:
To celebrate the Fable 5 launch, we just reset 5-hour and weekly limits for all users across our products!
Enjoy 🚀
item.description:
To celebrate the Fable 5 launch, we just reset 5-hour and weekly limits for all users across our products!
Enjoy 🚀

item.title:
Say hello to Fable 5, a Mythos-class model we've made safe for general use 🔥
This one's a doozy. So glad we can finally share with the world the ridiculous capabilities we've been relying on so heav
item.description:
Say hello to Fable 5, a Mythos-class model we've made safe for general use 🔥
This one's a doozy. So glad we can finally share with the world the ridiculous capabilities we've been relying on so heavily inside Ant the last few months. https://t.co/VrMvZQVvUZ

item.title: RT @AnthropicAI: Today, Anthropic engineers on average ship 8x as much code per quarter as they did compared to 2021-2025. https://t.co/QCc…

item.title:
Opus 4.8 is here!
It's our smartest Opus model to date, and the best GA model for coding and agents. https://t.co/kxoJiuLKfy

item.title:
From today, we’re doubling Claude Code’s 5-hour rate limits on Pro, Max, Team, seat-based Enterprise.
We’re also getting rid of the peak-hour rate limit cut we made on Pro and Max a few weeks ago.
item.description:
From today, we’re doubling Claude Code’s 5-hour rate limits on Pro, Max, Team, seat-based Enterprise.
We’re also getting rid of the peak-hour rate limit cut we made on Pro and Max a few weeks ago.

item.title:
Two attacks in two days. This is really bad. Disagree all you want on AI or any specific company, but violence like this is unacceptable.
Hoping @sama and his family get through this okay, and that
item.description:
Two attacks in two days. This is really bad. Disagree all you want on AI or any specific company, but violence like this is unacceptable.
Hoping @sama and his family get through this okay, and that the temperature cools down asap. https://t.co/dYz0kfPHov
